emails.body: #530608,# 531786, #531910 Hi Kate! I can't find any contact info. in GCP for these counterparties (California Dept. of Water Resources, Metro. Water Dist. of Southern Cal., and Atlantic Richfield Co.) Can you give me contact names and phone numbers so that i can get a verbal confirm on these deals? Thanks, Kim H.

emails.subject: Re: #530608,# 531786, & #531910
emails.body: Re: #530608,# 531786, #531910 The third deal 531910 I'm checking on with Les right now. Sharen Cason asked me this morning who the contact was, and typically with services deals the traders like to confirm the deals themselves so I'm not sure if it should be confirmed. The other two contain contact names are they not valid in GCP? Do you need new names and phone numbers or just numbers to go along with those names? Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 02/27/2001 08:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: #530608,# 531786, & #531910
emails.body: Re: #530608,# 531786, #531910 530608 CDWR Bob Floyd (916) 574-2768 531786 Metro Water of SoCal Jim Danielson (213) 217-6673 This should be the contact information in GCP. If it's not in there, let me know and I'll have it added. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 02/27/2001 08:58 AM
